training_status: returning to intense weightlifting after 5 years off; previously competitive powerlifter
health_conditions: chronic GI issues (constipation, diarrhea, heartburn, dumping syndrome)
joint and back pain from overtraining

benefits.description: Completely eliminated chronic GI issues (constipation, diarrhea, heartburn, dumping syndrome, nausea) within 24 hours after 3 weeks of treatment
Cured severe insomnia; able to sleep naturally without Lunesta; wakes refreshed

Improved task prioritization and motivation; reduced procrastination; gained ability to find reward in mundane tasks; reported feeling physical changes in frontal lobe and sustained epiphany-like state
Improved recovery from intense workouts and physical labor; tendons strengthened faster
Rapid strength gains with improved muscle hardness and vascularity; bench press increased from 205 to 225 lbs x15 reps in 4 weeks; squat increased from 225 to 300+ lbs; maintained pump throughout day
Acne completely healed during treatment period

side_effects.description: Reduced stimulant effect from Vyvanse and caffeine; moved from main processing to background processing; eliminated hyperactive/jittery feeling from stimulants and caffeine

protocol_notes: Reconstituted 5mg vial with 3ml bacteriostatic water. Oral administration via insulin syringe (12.5 units = ~250mcg) squirted into back of mouth on empty stomach. Also attempted 3 intramuscular injections (2 in stomach fat, 1 in wrist) which subjectively felt less effective than oral route. Subject spent over $50k on prior healthcare for GI issues. Used alongside Vyvanse 70mg daily, caffeine 100-200mg daily, and Clonidine for stimulant comedown. Post-treatment note: subject later reported GHRP-6 was more effective for complete symptom resolution.
